title: Evidence-based methodology for identifying drugs with potential human liver toxicities using WHO Vigibase data
author: Tsaioun, Katya
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Evidence-based methodology for analyzing adverse events related to Drug-Induced Liver Injury (DILI) in WHO Vigibase, a database of Adverse Drug Reactions (ADRs).
steps_raw: Evidence-based methodology for analyzing adverse events related to Drug-Induced Liver Injury (DILI) in WHO Vigibase, a database of Adverse Drug Reactions (ADRs).
